summary: Slide-in card from the right side.

versions.changelog: Update Props API to use standard accentColor, cardBackgroundColor, and animationStiffness.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/card-from-right/src/CardFromRight.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CardFromRight` and `cardFromRightDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Customize the CardFromRight Remotion component by setting the name, title, accentColor, titleColor, cardBackgroundColor, and animationStiffness while preserving the slide-in animation from the right and right text alignment.
